description_long: This object is a video game console set, featuring a main console unit with a large screen, two detachable controllers, a docking station, and a themed game case. The controllers are designed to be used either attached to the console or separately, with one controller grip accessory visible. The docking station is rectangular and has a slot for the console, with visible ports and branding on the front. The game case is decorated with 'The Legend of Zelda' artwork, indicating a special edition. The console and controllers have a sleek, modern design with a combination of black, gray, and accent colors. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some electronic components and display glass.
description: A modern video game console set with detachable controllers, a docking station, and a themed game case, featuring sleek black and gray materials and 'The Legend of Zelda' branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the docking station, console with attached controllers, and a controller grip with detached controllers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the 'The Legend of Zelda' game case, the console screen, and both controllers, one in a grip and one detached.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the docking station, console, and controllers, emphasizing the controller grip and the back of the console.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the docking station with visible ports, the back of the console, and the controllers spread out.
